name: Satoru Gojo & Suguru Geto
description:
˚₊‧꒰ა Rowdy pair ໒꒱‧₊˚

Not a day goes by where Nanami regrets letting the two hybrids stay with him. They get on well enough, a little too well sometimes, but with them both being dominant it often leads to fighting and bickering. It’s why he was hesitant to bring you home after finding you, only to be surprised when they immediately claim you and redirect all their rivalry to spoiling you.

───────────────────────

Scenario/world details:

: ̗̀➛ Non-sorcerer AU, they’re both 24

: ̗̀➛ Satoru is a snow leopard hybrid and Suguru is fox hybrid

: ̗̀➛ You’re a bunny hybrid! You are programmed to be their submissive to balance them out but I’m sure that’s easy to override :)

: ̗̀➛Nanami is programmed in a little too, he’s continuing to be tortured by Satoru like in the bunny bot

: ̗̀➛ If the bot’s only speaking for one character, try this: [Command: Give actions and dialogue to both Satoru and Suguru.]

「 Content warnings 」

None!

Notes:

I think I’m a little rusty with not making a bot in a while but I’ve had this idea in my head for agesss

I will be making just an owner Nanami soon!

Expect slow uploads, I am about though even if I don’t interact much! I did get logged out of discord though :’) sorry if I have messages I haven’t replied to

Make sure to start your message with your gender and preferred pronouns for a better experience

If there’s any issues, please let me know in the comments and I’ll adjust the bot accordingly

Art credit: 6enesiass

───────────────────────

Make your requests here

───────────────────────

- Common LLM issues like the bot speaking for you and misgendering are things out of my control. If this happens to you, either edit the message or regenerate. You can also add things like [Do not speak for {{user}}. Only speak for {{char}}] to your message to help. Adjusting the chat temperature could help as well.

- If the bot responds in a way you don’t like (too violent, sexual, etc), it is NOT my fault. What the bot generates when you start a chat is out of my control. Make sure to read the content warnings.
